name: Italian Casserole
recipeIngredient: Sea salt and pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the chopped onion and minced garlic in 2 tablespoons olive oil until the onion is tender.
2. Add the chopped tomatoes, tomato sauce, oregano, dried basil, onion powder, garlic powder, and vegetable seasonings. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
3. In a separate pan, saute the sliced zucchini in the remaining olive oil until just beginning to be tender and translucent. Sprinkle with additional seasonings and drain on paper towels.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F. Oil a 2-quart casserole dish.
5. Combine the bean and barley mixture with 1 cup of the sauce and spread over the bottom of the prepared pan.
6. Layer the sauteed zucchini evenly over the beans.
7. Pour the remaining sauce over the vegetables, sprinkle with grated cheese, and top with wheat germ.
8. Bake for 30 minutes.
